summary: Cost optimization refactor testing complete. All 10 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/debug/pipeline has 'gpt_ready' field (no GPT test call) - PASS
Backend: GET /api/debug/pipeline shows 'cache' stats (cached_breakdowns, version, ttl_hours) - PASS
Backend: POST /api/check-cache returns {cached: false, estimated_cost: 0.03} for new text with quick mode - PASS
Backend: POST /api/check-cache returns {cached: false, estimated_cost: 0.08} for new text with deep mode - PASS
Backend: POST /api/check-cache/batch returns correct cached/uncached counts and estimated cost (3 scenes quick = $0.09) - PASS
Backend: POST /api/check-cache/batch deep mode returns correct cost (2 scenes deep = $0.16) - PASS
Backend: POST /api/analyze/text caches result, second identical call returns from_cache: true - PASS
Backend: POST /api/analyze/scene caches result, second identical call returns from_cache: true - PASS
Backend: Scene text exceeding 8000 chars is hard-capped (analyze/text) - PASS
Backend: Scene text exceeding 8000 chars is hard-capped (analyze/scene) - PASS
Frontend: UploadPage loads with all input type buttons visible (Paste sides, Upload sides, Full Script) - PASS
Frontend: Full Script flow step 3 shows Deep mode warning when Deep is selected (data-testid='deep-mode-fullscript-warning') - PASS
Frontend: Full Script flow step 4 shows cost estimation panel (data-testid='cost-estimation') with correct pricing - PASS
Frontend: Analyze button shows loading state ('Analyzing...') and is disabled after click (isSubmitting guard) - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: Caching layer correctly implemented with SHA256 hash keys (text+mode+character_name+version)
SCENE_TEXT_HARD_CAP = 8000 chars properly enforced in both analyze/text and analyze/scene endpoints
debug/pipeline endpoint correctly shows 'gpt_ready' (no GPT call) and 'cache' stats for cost savings
check-cache and check-cache/batch endpoints correctly estimate costs ($0.03 quick, $0.08 deep per scene)
Frontend isSubmitting state properly guards against duplicate submissions
Deep mode warning in Full Script step 3 correctly warns about 3x cost
Cost estimation panel in step 4 correctly calculates and displays estimated cost
seed_data_creation: Test data created inline with unique UUIDs for cache testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cost optimization refactor fully tested. Key features: 1) Caching layer using MongoDB 'breakdown_cache' collection with SHA256 hash keys, 2) /api/debug/pipeline no longer makes GPT calls (shows 'gpt_ready' not 'gpt_call'), 3) /api/check-cache and /api/check-cache/batch endpoints for cost estimation, 4) Scene text hard cap at 8000 chars, 5) Frontend shows cost estimation in Full Script step 4 and Deep mode warnings in step 3, 6) Submit buttons have isSubmitting guard. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_cost_optimization.py covers all cache and cost features.

caching_layer.details: SHA256 hash keys, 72h TTL, from_cache flag in responses

debug_pipeline_no_gpt_call.details: Has 'gpt_ready' field with note about cost savings, no 'gpt_call' field

check_cache_endpoint.details: Returns cached status and estimated_cost (0.03 quick, 0.08 deep)

check_cache_batch_endpoint.details: Returns total, cached, uncached counts and total estimated_cost

scene_text_hard_cap.details: 8000 char limit enforced in both analyze/text and analyze/scene

frontend_cost_estimation.details: Shows in Full Script step 4 with correct pricing

frontend_deep_mode_warning.details: Shows in Full Script step 3 when Deep mode selected

frontend_isSubmitting_guard.details: Button shows 'Analyzing...' and is disabled after click
